# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

## Cloakroom

> west

# +1 points
# (first taking it off) You put the velvet cloak on the small brass hook.
> hang cloak on hook

## Foyer of the Opera House

> east

## Foyer Bar

> south

# The message, neatly marked in the sawdust, reads... In that game you scored
#   2 out of a possible 2, in 5 turns.
> read message
